channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumping Household Waste, 24th March
item.description:
Household waste is repeatedly being thrown from upper floor windows of the residential block onto the fenced off railway land. General household rubbish including food waste, alcohol bottles and cans, plastic cat tray, dirty cat litter, plastic bags of rubbish, milk bottles, birthday decorations, a scooter, and more.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on street, 23rd March
item.description:
Construction remains fly tipped on street, incredibly disgusting to see. Can the council please remove this as it encourages more of this behaviour if left for a long time. I have noticed this pile grow over the last 10 days so might be seen on CCTV?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cumberland Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned in a disabled bay, 23rd March
item.description:
Abandoned in a disabled bay for 4 months pluss NO TAX. NO M.O.T.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Christchurch Way, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged manhole, 23rd March
item.description:
Hgv lorry damaged the cover of a manhole

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Fleet Lane, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pesistent flytipping outside 110 Dunlace, 23rd March
item.description:
House no 110 continually dumps large rubbish items outside their house onto the street. large cardboard pieces and now a large box of packaging next to the tree. This problemis ongoing.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dunlace Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Piles of rubbish on pavement, 23rd March
item.description:
Rubbish on pavement outside pub next to crossing. Been like this for weeks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blackheath Hill, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Thorns, onto street & leaves, 23rd March
item.description:
Havexm report before , still get emails asking if ok now, no its not im afraid. Was last year sometime i reported. The thorns grow over fence onto pavement area from the church grounds. This is road that goes into gallions reach health center. The thorns catch on our clothes, scrach our legs and catch on our dogs body's because they grow over onto pavement. Ive had scratches a few times on leg and arms. Yesterday a lady with her dog and with a walking frame also has had same problem.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bentham Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned van with rotting rubbish, 23rd March
item.description:
This white van has been abandoned on Glenlea Road near the corner of Westmount Road for a few days. Now it has been broken into and the rotting rubbish piled right to the roof inside is spilling into the street. It’s a health hazard and looks awful. Please can someone tow it away.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Charlesfield, Chinbrook, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lampost not working, 23rd March
item.description:
Lampost has not been working for a while, it’s very dark.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 40, Beverley Avenue, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped near the bottom of the footbridge, 23rd March
item.description:
This rubbish, some in bags and some loose, has been accumulating over the past few days. Attracting foxes who are distributing it stones the neighbourhood.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bracondale Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping in Alleyway, 23rd March
item.description:
Broken down fence in alleyway which has caused fly-tipping including a large fridge freezer. Been there for at least 8 months.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maiden Lane, Barnes Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car battery dumped on pavement, 23rd March
item.description:
A car battery has been dumped on the kerbside, close to 1 Hilldrop Road. The battery is inside a cardboard box with a name and address label (see photo), 51 Peters Path, SE26 6LE

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hilldrop Road, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Making loud noise, 23rd March
item.description:
The man hole cover makes a loud noise everytime it’s driven over by a car and even louder noise when it’s driven over by a lorry.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thames Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cabinets on street in disrepair, 23rd March
item.description:
Cabinets in terrible state, one with doors broken off exposing wiring inside. Other has broken door, exposing wiring inside. Please can you contact the relevant utility owner and have them replaced. Many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): South Croxted Road, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 abandoned hopping trolley, 23rd March
item.description:
There are two abandoned shopping trolleys (one LIDL and one Costco). I have tried to contact the supermarkets directly and Trolleywise but no response.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13-56, Tyers Gate, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti - bus stop, 23rd March
item.description:
See photos

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 166, Rotherhithe New Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Fly tipping, 23rd March
item.description:
Overflowing bins and fly tipping in this area

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Warwick Grove, Hackney, London

item.description:
Fly tipping all over the estate

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Warwick Grove, Hackney, London

item.description:
Fly tipping all over the estate for more than a week

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Warwick Grove, Hackney, London

item.title: Fly tipping, 23rd March
item.description:
